metadata.description: Avatar generation spec combining shapes and colors for bot avatars.

shapes.name: Cyclops

shapes.name: Antenna
shapes.svg: <rect x="35" y="24" width="4" height="20" /><rect x="61" y="24" width="4" height="20" /><circle cx="37" cy="24" r="5" /><circle cx="63" cy="24" r="5" /><rect x="22" y="42" width="56" height="26" rx="13" /><rect x="34" y="48" width="10" height="6" rx="3" fill="#161b22" /><rect x="56" y="48" width="10" height="6" rx="3" fill="#161b22" />

shapes.name: Shield

shapes.name: Wide
shapes.svg: <rect x="18" y="44" width="6" height="12" rx="3" /><rect x="76" y="44" width="6" height="12" rx="3" /><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="23" /><path d="M 40 46 Q 44 40 48 46" stroke="#161b22" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" /><path d="M 52 46 Q 56 40 60 46" stroke="#161b22" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" /><circle cx="50" cy="56" r="4" fill="#161b22" />

template.svg_wrapper: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" width="100%" height="100%" style="color: ${COLOR_HEX};"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="46" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="currentColor" stroke-opacity="0.3" stroke-width="2"/><g fill="currentColor">${SHAPE_SVG}</g></svg>
